title: Production per Region per Month (Energinet)
description:
[Publisher: Energinet] Monthly electricity production per region, divided by production from water, wind, solar and thermal power plants.
To comply with laws regarding the protection of private data, **methods for anonymizing data have been applied**. This dataset uses number and dominance as a criterion for confidentiality. The number criteria is set to 20 and the dominance criteria is set to 60 percent per hour for 3 hours straight. 
In case of the criteria being exceeded, the dataset will combine data columns or aggregate data columns to a high level in the following order: 
1. Production types being combined
2. Regions being combined
3. Time being combined and/or aggregated
